notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Mike Trout batting, Zach Neto picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, pitcher Matthew Boyd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Ian Happ grounds into a force out, fielded by shortstop Zach Neto. Alex Bregman out at 2nd. Ian Happ advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Zach Neto.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Soler reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Alex Bregman. Mike Trout scores. Jo Adell to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Soler reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Soler reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Alex Bregman. Mike Trout scores. Jo Adell to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Carson Kelly reaches on a fielding error by center fielder Mike Trout. Carson Kelly to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Moisés Ballesteros pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Moisés Ballesteros grounds out, second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Jeimer Candelario.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
